subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Feb. 1920
subcodes.first_line: O ye who journey unto Iran! Whithersoever ye enter, ye must be embodied spirits, with divine attraction and heavenly radiance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شما که به ایران میروید بهر جا وارد شدید باید روح مجسم باشید . با انجذابی رحمانی و انعکاس ملکوتی
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity, @firmness in the Covenant
